strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with modern JavaScript/TypeScript and Node.js ecosystems
Demonstrated expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Limited recent deep engagement with React/Vitest (primary stack) in listed roles
Primary language focus shifts toward Dlang and AI tools, which may not align with required secondary stacks (Kotlin/Java)
Gaps in cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes) mentioned in prior roles
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack credentials with TypeScript/Node.js and relevant AI tooling, but his recent focus on Dlang and AI infrastructure may dilute alignment with the primary React/Vitest stack. His open-source contributions and engineering craftsmanship are notable strengths, though gaps in cloud-native tooling and secondary stacks require verification.
